channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: First_Blog
item.description: Yep this is my first blog using the Hugo stuff I just discovered.

item.title: About
item.description: Hi I’m Davey! I am computer science student, currently in my senior year. I like playing around with my computer and anything electronic related device. I use Linux as my daily driver, specifically Fedora. I also do programming projects in my free time. Welcome inside my locker!
